content:
Man I suffer so bad after drinking alcohol. The headaches aren't worth it. It's funny though because I drink WAY more at festivals and don't have these issues. I suspect when I drink at home I don't dance and it's actually a posture issue showing up 🤔 
Still... I'd much rather microdose shrooms or something... I need to find a dealer without intermediaries. Even better if I can learn to harvest my own
